title: zeuxine marivelensis
intro: Zeuxine marivelensis, also known as the Mariveles orchid, is a type of flowering plant species that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zeuxine marivelensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Zeuxine marivelensis can be made by infusing its flowers and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal benefits.
